title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Chandigarh University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Chandigarh University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!
